overview: Majestic Beauty & Nails Bar is a professional SaaS-style website for a nails and eyelash business featuring 3 nail technicians across 3 locations. Users can browse nail tech profiles, view portfolios, book appointments with date/time selection, and contact the business. Admins manage all bookings, gallery, services, and tech profiles.
features: Browse all 3 nail techs on one page with specialties and locations
Booking system with date/time picker — admin confirms or reschedules
Admin panel for managing bookings, gallery, services, and content
